title: Crispy Mexican Dumplings with Fermented Slaw
description: A twist on traditional Mexican cuisine, combining crispy dumplings with a tangy fermented slaw. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together mashed beans, crumble cheese, cumin, and chili powder
Place a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface and spoon a small amount of the bean mixture onto the center of the wrapper
Fold the wrapper over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling
Brush the tops of the dumplings with olive oil and sprinkle with additional crumble cheese
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown
While the dumplings are baking, prepare the fermented slaw according to package instructions
To serve, place a few dumplings on a plate and top with a spoonful of the fermented slaw
